target.title: Simplify QA scorecard mapping shape
target.body:
## Summary

- Make coverage IDs the canonical scorecard mapping key: `taxonomy-mappings.yaml` now maps taxonomy category IDs to behavior coverage IDs, not evidence file paths.
- Add stable category IDs to `taxonomy.yaml` so mapping categories validate against taxonomy IDs instead of display names.
- Keep QA scenario Markdown as the evidence source: scenarios declare `coverage.primary` / `coverage.secondary`, and the scorecard report discovers the scenario files that prove each mapped coverage ID.
- Treat primary coverage as fulfillment evidence; secondary-only coverage is reported as indirect support and leaves the mapped category partial.
- Keep profile membership one-way from top-level `profiles[].categoryIds` and report taxonomy fulfillment separately from QA coverage-ID inventory.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/scorecard-taxonomy.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/coverage-report.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-node.mjs qa coverage --json > /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-coverageids.json && jq '.scorecardTaxonomy | {fulfilledCategoryCount, requiredCategoryCount, taxonomyFulfillmentPercent, evidenceRefCount, mappedCoverageIdCount, mappedCoverageIdPercent, unmappedCoverageIdCount, validationIssueCount: (.validationIssues | length)}' /tmp/openclaw-qa-coverage-coverageids.json`
- `git diff --check`

Current real mapping report: 15 categories, 2 profiles, 5/15 fulfilled taxonomy categories (33.3%), 42 mapped coverage IDs, 103 unmapped coverage IDs, 56 discovered evidence refs, 21 validation warnings for secondary-only mapped coverage IDs.
